item.title: Osdk: support `cargo osdk miri-debugger` to run kmiri-helper before kmiri
item.body:
This helps to simplify the analysis.json generation steps, and makes mir debugger launch easier.

```bash
OSDK_LOCAL_DEV=1 MIRIFLAGS="--remap-path-prefix=$(rustc --print=sysroot)/lib/rustlib/src/rust/library/= --remap-path-prefix=$(realpath ../../asterinas)/=" \
  cargo osdk miri-debugger
```

repo.name: asterinas
repo.description: Asterinas aims to be a production-grade Linux alternative—memory safe, high-performance, and more.

issue.title: Osdk: support `cargo osdk miri-debugger` to run kmiri-helper before kmiri
issue.body:
This helps to simplify the analysis.json generation steps, and makes mir debugger launch easier.

```bash
OSDK_LOCAL_DEV=1 MIRIFLAGS="--remap-path-prefix=$(rustc --print=sysroot)/lib/rustlib/src/rust/library/= --remap-path-prefix=$(realpath ../../asterinas)/=" \
```

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ pub enum ActionChoice {
     Run,
     Test,
     Miri,
+    MiriDebugger,
 }
 
 #[derive(Clone, Debug, Default, Deserialize, Eq, PartialEq, Serialize)]

commit.message:
osdk: support `cargo osdk miri-debugger` to run kmiri-helper before kmiri

OSDK_LOCAL_DEV=1 MIRIFLAGS="--remap-path-prefix=$(rustc --print=sysroot)/lib/rustlib/src/rust/library/= --remap-path-prefix=$(realpath ../../asterinas)/=" cargo osdk miri-debugger
